CREATE TABLE s2_points (id UInt64, point UInt64);
SELECT s2CapContains(center, degrees, point) AS capContains FROM (SELECT 1157339245694594829 AS center, 1.0 AS degrees, 1157347770437378819 AS point);
SELECT s2CapContains(center, degrees, point) AS capContains FROM s2_points WHERE id = 1157339245694594829;
CREATE TABLE s2_circular_caps (center UInt64, degrees Float64, point UInt64);
SELECT s2CapContains(center, degrees, point) AS capContains FROM s2_circular_caps WHERE degrees < 5.0;
SELECT capContains FROM (SELECT s2CapContains(center, degrees, point) AS capContains FROM s2_circular_caps);
SELECT (SELECT s2CapContains(center, 1.0, point) FROM s2_circular_caps WHERE center = 1157339245694594829) AS capContains;
SELECT s2CapContains(center, degrees, point) AS capContains FROM (SELECT center, degrees FROM s2_circular_caps WHERE degrees > 0 AND degrees < 2) JOIN s2_points USING (id);
SELECT center, s2CapContains(center, degrees, point) AS capContains FROM s2_circular_caps WHERE center IN (SELECT id FROM s2_points WHERE id > 0);
